calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES-SHARRIANNA RICE-ARKELL, PETITIONER;
ATTY. MARY JANE GORDON FOR THE PETITIONER.

PER MS. GORDON SHE IS NEWLY SUBSTITUTING IN AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR THE PETITIONER.
A DECLARATION REGARDING CLAIMS AND LIABILITIES AND BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000.00 WILL BE FILED TODAY. AFTER REVIEW OF ALL THE DOCUMENTS PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED THE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

Judge John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR 7782. Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy H. Harris.

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Mar-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
